sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n47320" key="h(mitrh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἡμι-τρής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ῆτος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n47320.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">half-bored</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4093.tlg001:1:185" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Choerob.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">in Theod.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.185</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
